name: logistics coordinators managing 10-50 shipments/week tool
description: For logistics coordinators processing 10-50 shipments/week, inefficient inventory tracking causes stockouts. We provide an automated inventory tracking system instead of manual spreadsheets and email notifications.
problem_solved: Inefficient inventory tracking leading to stockouts.
features: simple dashboard for tracking inventory levels
